rule_hits.summary: Lists references related to seismic modeling, finite difference methods, and performance optimization techniques used in the development and evaluation of Minimod.
Explains seismic depth imaging as an inverse problem involving forward modeling to simulate wave propagation through the subsurface. Discusses the evolution of seismic algorithm...
Acknowledges support from Total and subsidiaries, Diego Klahr, Elies Bergounioux, Ryuichi Sai, Pierre Lagier, and Maxime Hugues for contributions to the project.
Provides details on Minimod's source code structure, including the implementation of wavefield calculations and the ability to select different propagators and targets for optim...
